mapper.update: UPDATE room SET status = #{status}, start_time = NOW() WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM room WHERE status = 0 AND max_players = #{maxPlayers} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 50
mapper.update: UPDATE room SET player_count = player_count + 1 WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND player_count < max_players
mapper.select: SELECT p.* FROM player p JOIN room_player rp ON p.id = rp.player_id WHERE rp.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY rp.seat_index ASC
